name: financial-win
description: financial-win Project - Base financial-win for full-stack applications with NestJS and React

scripts.build: pnpm --filter financial-win-api build && pnpm --filter financial-win-web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter financial-win-api test && pnpm --filter financial-win-web test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter financial-win-api lint && pnpm --filter financial-win-web lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter financial-win-api format && pnpm --filter financial-win-web format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter financial-win-api format:check && pnpm --filter financial-win-web format:check
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter financial-win-api clean && pnpm --filter financial-win-web clean
